content.en:
Dark Forbidden Realm.

The endless source sea origin energy poured into the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the Dark Forbidden Domain at this time was like a balloon that expanded rapidly, but it would not explode, as if it could expand infinitely.

However, the creatures in the Dark Forbidden Realm are blessed, and they have also obtained great benefits, and their cultivation has soared one by one.

And almost all the creatures in the Dark Forbidden Domain are Terrans, and as early as when Ye Xingchen attacked the Supreme One, the Terran Temple conveyed a message that all the other Terrans in the Outer Realm must all enter the Dark Forbidden Realm and enjoy this opportunity.

Thus, the Dark Forbidden Realm is densely populated with humans.

As the Dark Forbidden Realm continues to expand, an endless eternal continent is born, and endless resources are being bred.

The process of the Dark Forbidden Domain's promotion to the Eternal Heaven and Earth will take a long time, about the time of a Great Tribulation.

Of course, until the Dark Forbidden Realm is completely stabilized, the Supreme One will not be able to enter the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Moreover, even after stabilization, the Eternal Heaven and Earth will have a protection period, that is, only the native supreme beings of the Eternal Heaven and Earth will be allowed to enter, and outsiders will not be allowed to enter.

And this protection period is 100,000 eons, in order to prevent other supreme beings from entering the nascent eternal heaven and earth to plunder resources.

Because the newborn Eternal Heaven and Earth will give birth to a large number of eternal resources, and even a lot of resources that allow the Supreme to quickly improve their cultivation, which is why the three Supreme Beings of the Tianlin Realm are so much stronger than the other Supreme Beings.

Because they occupied those precious resources that were generated at the beginning of the birth of the Tianlin Realm, their strength naturally increased quickly, and they were above the other supreme beings.

The promotion of the Dark Forbidden Domain to the Eternal Heaven and Earth cannot be hidden.

Ye Tian had hidden the Dark Forbidden Domain before, but now that the formation had been broken with the promotion of the Dark Forbidden Domain, he could no longer hide it.

Some of the nearby Exotic Heavens and Immortals immediately sensed the promotion of the Dark Forbidden Domain, so the news was quickly transmitted to the Tianlin Realm, which was not very far away from the Dark Forbidden Domain.

At the first moment, one of the supreme beings in the Tianlin Realm rushed to the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Even the three supreme beings of the Tianlin Realm came.

Tianlin Source Ancestor, Autumn Leaf Source Ancestor, Sword Heng Source Ancestor.

These three supreme beings are the three well-deserved three supreme beings in the Tianlin Realm, among which the Tianlin Source Ancestor is the sixfold supreme, the Autumn Leaf Source Ancestor and the Sword Heng Source Ancestor are all fivefold supreme, their strength completely crushes the other supremes, and they can bombard and kill ordinary supreme beings with one hand.

......

"Which exotic world is this?"

Tianlin Origin Ancestor wondered.

Didn't he just retreat a little longer, why was there suddenly an eternal heaven and earth nearby?

"Lord Tianlin Origin Ancestor, this should be the Dark Forbidden Domain, belonging to the Endless Ancestor!"

The Heavenly Wind Source God spoke.

The Endless Ancestor is also the name of Ye Tian now, and after he became the Supreme, he was ready to use the title of the Endless Ancestor.

Endless Ancestor?

Tianlin Origin Ancestor had never heard of this title, but he really wanted to see it.

"Heavenly Wind Source God, can you contact the Endless Ancestor?" asked the Akiba Source God.

"Yes!"

The Heavenly Wind Source God immediately contacted Ye Tian.

In fact, Ye Tian had been secretly paying attention to the situation in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and after receiving the summons from the Heavenly Wind Source God, he came out as soon as possible.

Crash!

Ye Tian walked out of the void and looked at the many supreme beings in the Tianlin Realm.

In the past, he could be regarded as belonging to the Tianlin Realm, but now he belonged to the eternal world of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

"The Fivefold Supreme !!!"

Tianfeng Yuanshen's eyes widened, a little incredulous.

How long has it been since he had seen Ye Tian, and Ye Tian had been promoted to this realm?

How difficult it is for the Supreme One to ascend to the realm, which is not to take countless eons as time, or even stay in a certain realm for eternity and cannot break through.

However, Ye Tian was quietly promoted to the Fivefold Peak Supreme, I am afraid that it will not be long before he is expected to be promoted to the Sixfold Supreme.

Tianlin Yuan Ancestor looked at Ye Tian and felt a mortal threat.

Under his perception, Ye Tian was very powerful, even more powerful than him.

"Impossible, he is only a five-fold supreme, how can he be stronger than me, it should be an illusion!"

Tianlin Yuanzu secretly said in his heart.

However, he would not underestimate Ye Tian, and greeted him very politely: "I have seen the Endless Ancestor!"

"Your Excellency is ......"

Ye Tian didn't know what to call it, but fortunately, the Heavenly Wind Source God introduced Ye Tian and let Ye Tian know the name of the Tianlin Source Ancestor.

"I've seen Tianlin Origin Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said politely.

Tianlin Origin Ancestor smiled and said, "Endless Ancestor, the distance between our two eternal heavens and earths is relatively close, and we can cooperate more in the future." "

"That's nature!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Immediately, the two chatted.

Of course, Tianlin Yuanzu didn't stay here for long, he just came to see and confirm the situation here by the way.

He also didn't want to be an enemy of Ye Tian, there was nothing good.

Fortunately, he didn't have such thoughts, otherwise he would have been desperate.

Before you know it, a great tribulation has passed.

At this time, the Dark Forbidden Realm completely turned into an eternal world.

And Ye Tian's family returned to the Dark Forbidden Domain one by one, although Ye Tian's body did not come back, but the copy body returned.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Jinpeng, the two supreme beings, naturally also returned, and some invincible people of the human race in the Tianlin Realm also returned to the Eternal Heaven and Earth, even if some invincibles who joined the Tianfeng Sea, the Tianfeng Sea did not keep them, and the Tianfeng Source God did not dare to keep them!

Not long after the Dark Forbidden Domain had just been promoted to Eternal Heaven and Earth, the entire human race was still a little chaotic.

As a result, the high-level Terrans are dividing the regions and managing the Terrans separately, and many Terrans have obtained a lot of fiefdoms.

Moreover, the Terrans encourage the establishment of factions to manage many areas with each force, otherwise it would not be able to manage them at all if they were managed by the Terran Temple.

It took dozens of great tribulations for the Dark Forbidden Domain to be completely stabilized.

After that, Ye Tian personally established countless teleportation arrays for the human race, otherwise ordinary teleportation arrays would not be able to teleport in the Eternal Heaven and Earth at all, plus the Eternal Heaven and Earth were too big, unless they reached the Ancestor, they would not be able to fly too far at all.

When the Dark Forbidden Domain stabilized, Ye Tian didn't need to worry about it.

After that, he began to collect various rare resources in the Dark Forbidden Realm.

His countless incarnations are scattered throughout the Dark Forbidden Realm, and any important resources that are born are taken by him.

Most of the resources were of no use to him, but they could exist in the temple, and a small part of them were given to Ye Jinpeng and Ye Xingchen for their use, and they had just been promoted to the realm of the First Supreme One.

They were in dire need of these resources, and Ye Jinpeng and Ye Xingchen were no longer cultivating, they were both looking for resources suitable for the Supreme One.

It can be said that this era is their best era and their opportunity.

In this way, the Dark Forbidden Domain ushered in an era of rapid development of the human race, and countless invincible people were born.
